display.purpose: Screen titles and the points balance. 22px is the ceiling — dense tool, no oversized hero.

body.purpose: All reading text at 15px inside the 540px column.

label.purpose: Functional uppercase data micro-labels only, never decorative eyebrows.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Resting shadow on every card (dark). Light theme: 0 10px 26px rgba(110,70,170,.14), tinted not black.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Lit signal under primary buttons and active elements. Reserved for action.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input/control focus, paired with a lime border.

motion.name: theme-swap
motion.purpose: Smooth transition between Neon Pitch and Candy Pop.

breakpoints.name: column
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column max width; the app is phone-first and never widens past this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action button — lime fill, presses down on tap.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background:#9fe85f; color:#0a160e; border:0; border-radius:13px; padding:13px 18px; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(159,232,95,.18); transition:transform .12s, box-shadow .2s, background-color .25s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(159,232,95,.28); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px) scale(.99); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(159,232,95,.35); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity:.4; cursor:not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background:transparent; color:#e9f7ee; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); border-radius:13px; padding:13px 18px; font-weight:700; font-size:15px; transition:border-color .15s, background-color .15s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color:rgba(159,232,95,.4); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform:translateY(1px) scale(.99); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Pill status/badge — lime on a raised surface.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:5px 11px; border-radius:999px; font-size:12.5px; font-weight:700; white-space:nowrap; background:#1b2d23; color:#9fe85f; border:1px solid rgba(159,232,95,.32); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Floating rounded surface with ambient shadow — the base container.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#14241b; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius:20px; padding:16px; box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.32); color:#e9f7ee; } .ds-card-row { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:12px; font-weight:600; } .ds-pts { font-weight:800; color:#84e07a; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Field on a dark well; lime border + glow on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background:#0c1812; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); color:#e9f7ee; border-radius:12px; padding:12px 13px; font-size:15px; width:100%; outline:none; transition:border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#8ba89a; } .ds-input:focus { border-color:#9fe85f; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(159,232,95,.18); }

components.name: Settlement Checklist Option
components.description: Signature admin surface — a full-width checkable outcome row; tick box fills lime when the outcome is marked a winner.
components.css: .ds-sq-opt { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; width:100%; text-align:left; padding:11px 13px; border-radius:12px; background:#1b2d23; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); color:#e9f7ee; font-size:14px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .14s, border-color .14s; } .ds-sq-box { flex:none; width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:7px; border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); background:#0c1812; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:13px; color:transparent; transition:.14s; } .ds-sq-lbl { flex:1; } .ds-sq-oo { color:#8ba89a; font-weight:700; font-size:12.5px; } .ds-sq-opt.ds-cur { background:rgba(132,224,122,.07); border-color:rgba(132,224,122,.4); } .ds-sq-opt.ds-cur .ds-sq-box { background:#84e07a; border-color:#84e07a; color:#06210f; }

narrative.overview: The Prophet is a night match under stadium floodlights, held in the hand. The default Neon Pitch theme is a near-black pitch-green field lit by a single electric-lime glow; Candy Pop is the same match in daylight, lavender and violet. It is a game, not a bookmaker — friends leaning over a phone arguing about a scoreline, not a casino floor. The layout is a narrow (≤540px), thumb-first single column; density is high but breathing, with rounded 20px cards floating on a dark field under soft shadow and a faint accent glow. Color is functional: lime is action/your points, green is win, coral is loss, gold is streak/reward.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first single column, ≤540px, generous bottom padding for a sticky nav.
Dark Neon Pitch default; light Candy Pop alternate — both first-class, both pass contrast.
One electric accent (lime / violet) for action, plus a fixed win/lose/gold semantic set.
Soft glow and shadow for depth; rounded tactile cards; no flat gray.
Vietnamese UI copy, casual and a little cheeky.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Exactly one action color per theme (lime, or violet in Candy Pop). Other emphasis uses weight, size, or a semantic outcome color — never a second bright hue.

rules.name: The Semantic Lock
rules.body: Green/coral/gold mean win/loss/reward only. Never decorative.

rules.name: The Contrast Floor Rule
rules.body: Muted text must clear 4.5:1 on its surface; muted-quiet (#5f7669) and Candy Pop muted (#7d7596) are borderline — large or non-essential text only.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Outfit only; hierarchy is weight (400 → 800 → 900) and size, never a second typeface.

rules.name: The Functional Caps Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked type only as a genuine data label, never a decorative eyebrow.

rules.name: The Lit-Not-Flat Rule
rules.body: Cards rest with soft ambient shadow; action elements add an accent glow. A dead-flat card reads as broken here.

rules.name: The Glow Belongs To Action Rule
rules.body: The lime glow is reserved for interactive/active elements, not static decoration.

dos: Do keep one action color per theme; express other emphasis with weight, size, or a semantic color.
Do reserve green/coral/gold for win/loss/reward only.
Do give cards the ambient shadow and action elements the accent glow — lit, never flat.
Do keep body text at ink and verify muted text clears 4.5:1.
Do design mobile-first inside the 540px column with the primary matchday action one tap away.
Do use uppercase tracked type only as functional data labels.
donts: Don't adopt real-money sportsbook patterns — no blinking, nagging, or dark-pattern bet nudges. Points are play.
Don't ship the gray uniform card-grid of template SaaS admins or repeat identical icon+heading+text cards.
Don't use AI-landing grammar: no uppercase eyebrow on every section, no background-clip:text gradient text, no hero-metric template.
Don't drift toward navy-and-gold fintech stiffness — keep playful, competitive warmth.
Don't nest a card inside a card; use a surface-raised panel.
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't put muted gray text on the lime/violet accent — use accent-ink.
